headline: Ravens Regime: Preseason Front Office Brief
executive_summary: Ravens Regime is projected #7 of 16 with a 80.09 championship-lineup C-AVI average, led by Lamar Jackson, Tyler Warren, and Derrick Henry. The immediate priority is improving the RB slot without weakening that core.

projected_power.method: Verified championship-lineup C-AVI average from all 16 AVI-Core knowledge team files

latest_trade.summary: On July 15, Ravens Regime traded with Northside Kings and acquired Tyler Warren while sending RJ Harvey, Bhayshul Tuten, 2026 Round 2 (Rapid Valley Annihilation). Tyler Warren is now the current TE starter at 97.2 C-AVI and 90.5 D-AVI; The deal sent out 1 draft asset, reducing future flexibility.

gap_closing_moves: Raise the RB slot above Kyle Monangai's 55.6 C-AVI baseline; a replacement near 65.6 C-AVI would directly attack the 0.77-point projected gap to Corgi Loaf Baking Co..
Use draft capital as a targeted sweetener for a verified starting-lineup upgrade, not for additional bench depth.

latest_trade.summary: On July 13, All Hail King Jesus traded with Ravens Regime and acquired Isiah Pacheco, 2026 Round 1 (Southside Savages) while sending Derrick Henry. Isiah Pacheco is now on the current roster at 47.5 C-AVI and 63.4 D-AVI; The deal added 1 draft asset.

rival_below.summary: On July 13, All Hail King Jesus traded with Ravens Regime and acquired Isiah Pacheco, 2026 Round 1 (Southside Savages) while sending Derrick Henry. Isiah Pacheco is now on the current roster at 47.5 C-AVI and 63.4 D-AVI; The deal added 1 draft asset.

sections.title: Projected Power Position
sections.body: Projected #7 of 16 at 80.09 lineup C-AVI. Corgi Loaf Baking Co. is immediately above at 80.86, a gap of 0.77. All Hail King Jesus is immediately behind at 78.25.

sections.title: Competitive Core
sections.body: The three highest C-AVI starters are Lamar Jackson (97.2), Tyler Warren (97.2), and Derrick Henry (92.8).
